claims.text: witness account: at the gate that was giving witness 1 trouble, at about three quarters of the windshield up, saw a linear object with a super bright light on the east side
witness account: light was bright white and bright enough to see bands within the light; object was 'metallic / gray in color', no wings or exhaust
witness account: object was smaller than a 737, one to two Blackhawk helicopters in length, definitely bigger than a drone
witness account: object was approximately 5000 feet above ground level, moved east to west parallel to the ground
witness account: object was visible for five to ten seconds, then the light went out and the object vanished; sky was clear and witness couldn't find the object again
witness account: object stayed the same size and same light intensity during observation; no interference with vehicles noted

witness aftermath: that night a storm came through and TV went out in hotel room; witness was 'still freaked out' and went downstairs to check other TVs; had weird dreams and trouble sleeping for first two nights after sighting
